message:
fix(ci): increase Quality job timeout from 60 to 90 minutes

Ubuntu shared runners frequently exceed 60 minutes for full Rust
compilation + test suite, causing cargo test to be cancelled (not
failed). 90 minutes matches the release build job timeout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ jobs:
   quality:
     name: Quality (${{ matrix.os }})
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
-    timeout-minutes: 60
+    timeout-minutes: 90
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
